summary: Upgraded android-extractor.py to v0.1.1. Fixed global_funcs inflation (3873 → 24) by requiring no leading whitespace before fun/typealias detection. Added internal path filters (/internal/, /impl/, /dao/, /data/local/, /data/remote/, /di/, /util/internal/). Added nested class detection (162 nested types emitted).
notes: Types dropped from 1381 → 969 due to internal path exclusions. AmityCoreClient now has 48 members (was likely fewer due to internal leakage). Builder/internal types no longer appear at top level.
